title: Jamaican Chocolate Oat Bake
description: A delicious breakfast bake infused with the flavors of Jamaica, featuring chocolate and oats.
instructions: In a large bowl, whisk together the tra, oats, jamaican, and bake.
In a separate bowl, melt the x and chocolatey in the microwave or over a double boiler.
Add the melted x and chocolatey mixture to the dry ingredients and stir until combined.
Pour the batter into a greased 8x8 inch baking dish.
Bake for 25-30 minutes or until a toothpick inserted in the center comes out clean.
Remove from oven and let cool for 5 minutes.
Cut into squares and serve warm.
